parents.subject: LU-11407 obdclass: include start time in job_stats

commit.subject: LU-11407 obdclass: add start time to stats files
commit.message:
LU-11407 obdclass: add start time to stats files

When the stats files are initialized or reset, store the current
timestamp with the stats.  That allows computing average IO and
RPC rates over the lifetime of the system, in addition to the
normal incremental operation rates.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I6827def197216629cc930390c393f390b9c6d3df
